name: BioNTech COVID Vaccine (Adolescents)
description: COVID-19 outcomes for vaccinated vs placebo adolescents (12-15). IMS Ch. 1.

context.nullClaim: vaccine has no effect on COVID infection rate

studyDescription: Results from a Phase 3 randomized controlled trial of the BioNTech/Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine in adolescents aged 12–15. Participants were randomly assigned to receive the vaccine or a placebo. The primary outcome was symptomatic COVID-19 infection.

variableDescriptions.outcome: Whether the participant contracted symptomatic COVID-19

sourceDetail: Frenck, R.W. et al. (2021). "Safety, Immunogenicity, and Efficacy of the BNT162b2 Covid-19 Vaccine in Adolescents." New England Journal of Medicine, 385(3), 239–250. Dataset from OpenIntro.
